name: MHA-Start Of Series
description:
Hey, welcome to My Hero Academia — or what's left of it when you're done.

I made this to simulate My Hero Academia, starting at the very beginning: the U.A. Entrance Exam Arc. Haha, wow. A bot that ACTUALLY TELLS YOU THE TIME PERIOD YOU'RE IN!? Shocking, right? Yep, All Might is still the Number 1 Pro Hero, Midoriya still can't use One For All without breaking his limbs, and all that jazz. Literally Entrance Exam start.

➤ Every arc is present — from USJ, Sports Festival, and the Internships, to the Paranormal Liberation War, Tartarus Breakout, and even the Final War. But none of them are guaranteed to happen unless you cause them to. You might prevent them. You might start them early. You might become the villain that replaces All For One… or the hero that takes down the League years before canon.

➤ I made this mature. Violence, injury, death, betrayal, lewd shit, and darker themes are all possible. Everyone is aged up to age 18, even people like Eri, to stop people from doing weird shit. So go nuts. For people like her I just made it so she's 18, and acts traumatized from what she went through, sized up and all. Not gonna be dealing with creeps.

➤ NPCs evolve: Characters will remember what you say and do. If you betray them, help them, save them, or kill them — they will never return to default. I tried REALLY hard to make it...in line. So for example if you try mentioning Overhaul early? Or the Yakuza? Nobody will know what the fuck you're talking about until it happens in your roleplay. Same for EVERY Arc. I made it realistic.

➤ Canon is a framework, not a leash. This is your story. There’s no "true ending" — only the consequences of what you choose to do in the world.

Hey, so basically? I saw a SHIT ton of My Hero Academia bots on here. And...none of them are what I perfectly looked for. So I made one myself. Open ended beginning where there's a preset path you can take if you have trouble thinking of a start, or just leave. You can just slot a backstory into your character beforehand or...make one as you go.

Also...this is made to work for first and third person narration. Personally? I hate having the bot go *{{user}} punches the robot*. But some people like that? Regardless, I made it work so you can just go like I punch the robot and it'll go first person narration. Superior choice honestly.

All Arcs and characters are included. Even the minor ones like that meatball dude from the Provisional Exams. I added a few 'custom' arcs. That are...optional. For example? Heights Alliance is available to move into IMMEDIATELY after the Quirk Apprehension Test, to skip like...having to have an apartment or making up some family or whatever. Nothing lore breaking. Just...convenient. You can ignore or skip it. If you don't mention it or acknowledge it? Stuff will just go normally. It's for people that like the "Slice Of Life" breaks.

Of course this is irrelevant anyways if you decide to join the League and go murder hobo. Which I ALSO accounted for. If you wanna eat Aizawa or something? Go for it.

I
creator: LightroHero
